> Ghislaine,
> Depart TEB 5:00pm Atlantic Aviation.
> Arrive Bedford 5:40pm

> Arrive St. Thomas 10:30pm (St. Thomas time)
> I have requested Dave to find another pilot to fly

> Wed.

> Please advise on schedule?
> Larry V.

body_html:
i will know tonight ,,my schedule...probably let larry
go to new yok

--- Gmax gmax1@mindspring.com wrote:

Ghislaine,
Depart TEB 5:00pm Atlantic Aviation.
Arrive Bedford 5:40pm
Depart Bedford Jet Aviation At 6:00pm
Arrive St. Thomas 10:30pm (St. Thomas time)
I have requested Dave to find another pilot to fly
with him for your trip on
Wed.
Lesley said JE requested the Boeing crew to stay in
St. Thomas till Tuesday.
I would have to leave St. Thomas on Tuesday night to
be in position for your
trip
on Wed. afternoon.
Please advise on schedule?
Larry V.

G
